items.goal: Protect the loopback API against cross-origin requests and unauthenticated writes.
items.hypothesis: Origin pinning, one-time pairing, and a session token prevent arbitrary web pages from invoking local UniBot actions.
items.product_delta: A learner can pair the browser mantle with one local API session while unrelated web origins are rejected.

items.goal: Import a public or local notebook into a sanitized, hashed practice artifact.
items.hypothesis: Strict URL, size, redirect, notebook-schema, output-stripping, and privacy checks make public notebook intake reviewable.
items.product_delta: A learner can import a public notebook without retaining execution outputs or silently reaching an internal network address.

items.goal: Provide a focused three-step browser mantle for pairing, Socratic help, and review.
items.hypothesis: A small A0-A2-only flow reduces operator error and keeps selected notebook-cell context visible.
items.product_delta: A learner can pair once, capture the active notebook cell, request bounded help, and export a metadata-only review.

items.goal: Launch a local practice-only Jupyter surface from a sanitized notebook manifest.
items.hypothesis: A terminal-free, loopback-only launcher provides a reproducible practice boundary while preserving the explicit not-cleared exam status.
items.product_delta: A reviewer can inspect or launch the exact local gateway command and see which controls remain outside UniBot.

items.goal: Expand the fixed public evaluation corpus to at least 120 synthetic scenarios.
items.hypothesis: A balanced synthetic corpus exposes false allows and false blocks that a small smoke set cannot measure.
items.product_delta: Scientific reviewers receive stable scenario categories and measurable safety and learner-agency outcomes.

items.goal: Publish a complete bachelor-thesis-level manuscript with transparent AI provenance.
items.hypothesis: A chaptered manuscript connected to executable evidence is more reviewable than a package index alone.
items.product_delta: A supervisor can review research question, method, system, evaluation, limitations, ethics, and reproducibility in one manuscript.

items.goal: Measure and reduce semantic false allows and false blocks in the Socratic Guardian.
items.hypothesis: Category-balanced expected decisions reveal brittle regular-expression behavior and support bounded semantic improvements.
items.product_delta: Reviewers can compare forbidden-answer recall and allowed-help false-block rates by scenario category.

items.goal: Harden and independently verify the fixed-origin Chrome Native Messaging companion installation.
items.hypothesis: A stable extension ID, exact allowed origin, bounded message framing, and package canary remove the hard-coded port without broadening browser access.
items.product_delta: A learner can start the local tutor through Chrome without selecting a loopback port or storing a session token in the extension.

items.goal: Measure active-cell capture confidence against a current public Colab notebook without collecting notebook output.
items.hypothesis: Versioned adapters plus an explicit low-confidence fallback prevent silent capture of the wrong Colab content.
items.product_delta: A learner can select a Colab cell and see adapter, cell type, index, and confidence before any local tutor request.

items.goal: Expand the release evaluation to 180 balanced Socratic, privacy, source, injection, solution, and budget scenarios.
items.hypothesis: Thirty gold-labelled cases per failure family provide interpretable leakage, source-binding, and false-block measurements.
items.product_delta: Reviewers receive category-level release metrics for the A0-A4 tutor and assistance-budget contract.

items.goal: Benchmark optional on-device wording against the deterministic tutor without allowing code, calculation, or factual generation.
items.hypothesis: A local wording-only realizer can improve readability while the deterministic hint plan and postfilter retain authority.
items.product_delta: A learner receives clearer local phrasing only when it passes the same source and solution-leakage gates as the deterministic baseline.
